heading: Electronic format for submissions
label: 379k–1 Electronic format for submissions
notes: Effective Date of 2017 AmendmentAmendment by title II of , effective , except that fees under subpart 3 of part C of this subchapter to be assessed for all submissions listed in received on or after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. amendments: Effective Date of 2017 AmendmentAmendment by title II of , effective , except that fees under subpart 3 of part C of this subchapter to be assessed for all submissions listed in received on or after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 115–52section 379j(a)(2)(A) of this titlesection 209 of Pub. L. 115–52section 379i of this titleOct. 1, 2017Oct. 1, 2017

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Beginning no earlier than 24 months after the issuance of a final guidance issued after public notice and opportunity for comment, submissions under subsection (b), (i), or (j) of or subsection (a) or (k) of shall be submitted in such electronic format as specified by the Secretary in such guidance.section 355 of this titlesection 262 of title 42

children.label: A
children.text: provide a timetable for establishment by the Secretary of further standards for electronic submission as required by such paragraph; and

children.label: B
children.text: set forth criteria for waivers of and exemptions from the requirements of this subsection.

children.heading: Exception
children.label: 3 Exception
children.text: This subsection shall not apply to submissions described in .section 360bbb of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Beginning after the issuance of final guidance implementing this paragraph, presubmissions and submissions for devices under section 360(k), 360c(f)(2)(A), 360e(c), 360e(d), 360e(f), 360j(g), 360j(m), or 360bbb–3 of this title or , and any supplements to such presubmissions or submissions, shall include an electronic copy of such presubmissions or submissions.section 262 of title 42

children.label: A
children.text: provide standards for the electronic copy required under such paragraph; and

children.label: B
children.text: set forth criteria for waivers of and exemptions from the requirements of this subsection.

children.heading: Presubmissions and submissions solely in electronic format
children.label: 3 Presubmissions and submissions solely in electronic format

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Beginning on such date as the Secretary specifies in final guidance issued under subparagraph (C), presubmissions and submissions for devices described in paragraph (1) (and any appeals of action taken by the Secretary with respect to such presubmissions or submissions) shall be submitted solely in such electronic format as specified by the Secretary in such guidance.

children.label: i
children.text: any further standards for the submission by electronic format required under subparagraph (A);

children.label: ii
children.text: a timetable for the establishment by the Secretary of such further standards; and

children.label: iii
children.text: criteria for waivers of and exemptions from the requirements of this subsection.

children.heading: Final guidance
children.label: C Final guidance
children.text: The Secretary shall, not later than 1 year after the close of the public comment period on the draft guidance issued under subparagraph (B), issue final guidance.
